title: Terminal int8 HardSwish retry/resume proof block
hypothesis: A fresh standalone int8 HardSwish block under a unique canonical path can validate dashboard Resume recovery after evaluator-side submission interruption without rerunning the evaluation.

direct_comparison.primary_question: Can one fresh bounded HardSwish block prove that dashboard Resume recovers a finished Layer 1 evaluation after evaluator-side gh logout?
include: one standalone int8 HardSwish block under a unique design path
one forced submission interruption followed by dashboard Resume
exclude: broad parameter sweeps beyond the single retry/resume candidate
follow_on_broad_sweep: none unless the dashboard Resume path still loses completion state or reviewable evidence

expected_benefit: proves that a finished proposal-backed Layer 1 run can be resumed from the dashboard after submission interruption
adds one more bounded HardSwish circuit_block reference under a unique canonical path
risks: this is primarily a workflow-proof item rather than a product-improvement item
the physical metrics may be redundant relative to the accepted HardSwish reference

expected_result.reason: the first goal is to complete one fresh bounded run and prove that dashboard Resume can recover submission without rerunning evaluation
